title: Credentials entered in a simulation
message: Rohan Patel from Accounts (Hyderabad) entered a password on the "Vendor Payment Request" test. A short lesson has been assigned automatically.

title: Campaign finished
message: "GST Notice" wrapped up across the Mumbai branch — 312 sent, 6.1% clicked, 41% reported it.

title: Lesson completed
message: Priya Verma from the Pune Finance team finished the "Spotting fake invoices" module.

title: Worth a look
message: Sales has been clicking payment-themed lures more often this month. An "Invoice Approval" test might be a good next step.

title: Several reports in minutes
message: Three people in Operations (Noida) reported the same "Courier Delivery" email within four minutes of each other.

title: June compliance summary ready
message: The monthly summary is generated. Overall click rate is down to 5.4%, from 7.9% in May.

title: Campaign scheduled
message: "KYC Update" is scheduled for the Bengaluru IT team on 1 July at 10:00 AM IST.

title: 90 days clean
message: The Bengaluru branch has gone 90 days without a single credential submission.

title: Team completed training
message: The Delhi HR team reached 100% completion on "Password hygiene".

title: New template added
message: Added a new India-specific template: "EPFO Aadhaar linking reminder".

title: Clicked, but no details shared
message: Aman Gupta from Sales (Gurugram) opened the "Salary Revision" link but didn't enter anything.

title: Reporting is uneven
message: Finance reports suspicious mail the fastest; Operations is the slowest. A short refresher for Operations could close the gap.

title: Weekly board summary
message: The board summary for 22–28 June has been generated and is ready to share.

title: Campaign launched
message: "Fake UPI Refund" went out to 148 people in the Chennai branch.

title: Backup completed
message: The scheduled nightly backup finished successfully. Snapshot ID: BK-7741.

title: Lesson completed
message: Vivek Kulkarni finished "Recognising look-alike domains" with a 95% score.

title: Click rate above threshold
message: Click rate in Accounts (Ahmedabad) reached 9% this week, above the 6% threshold you set.

title: Session policy updated
message: Admin sessions now time out after 15 minutes of inactivity.

title: Results are in
message: "PF Verification" results: 0 credential submissions across 96 recipients.

title: First catch
message: Neha Joshi reported her first phishing email — a good catch.
